dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8364 EH: To amend title 5, United States Code, to authorize the increase of the retirement age in the United States Capitol Police.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.official-title: To amend title 5, United States Code, to authorize the increase of the retirement age in the United States Capitol Police.

section.header: Increase in retirement age of United States Capitol Police officers

subsection.text: Section 8335(c) of title 5, United States Code, is amended by striking becomes 60 years of age and inserting attains an age determined by the Board that shall be not less than 57 years of age and not more than 65 years of age.

Section 8425(c) of title 5, United States Code, is amended by striking becomes 60 years of age and inserting attains an age determined by the Board that shall be not less than 57 years of age and not more than 65 years of age.

attestation-group.attestation-date: Passed the House of Representatives April 27, 2026.
